briefdescription.para: If the F bit is set to 0, this field indicates the number of frames contained in this packet.

detaileddescription.para: If the F bit is set to 1, this field indicates the number of remaining fragments, including the current fragment. Therefore, the last counter value shall be one.

briefdescription.para: Set to 1 for the last packet of a fragmented SBC frame, otherwise set to 0.
Set to 1 for the starting packet of a fragmented SBC frame, otherwise set to 0.
Set to 1 if the SBC frame is fragmented, otherwise set to 0.
If the F bit is set to 0, this field indicates the number of frames contained in this packet.

detaileddescription.para: If the F bit is set to 1, this field indicates the number of remaining fragments, including the current fragment. Therefore, the last counter value shall be one.

briefdescription.para: Set to 1 for the last packet of a fragmented SBC frame, otherwise set to 0.
Set to 1 for the starting packet of a fragmented SBC frame, otherwise set to 0.
Set to 1 if the SBC frame is fragmented, otherwise set to 0.

memberdef.name: BT_A2DP_SBC_MEDIA_HDR_ENCODE
memberdef.initializer: FIELD_PREP(GENMASK(3, 0), num_frames) | FIELD_PREP(BIT(5), l) |\ FIELD_PREP(BIT(6), s) | FIELD_PREP(BIT(7), f)

briefdescription.para: get channel num of a2dp sbc config.
get channel mode of a2dp sbc config.
get sample rate of a2dp sbc config.
get subband num of a2dp sbc config.
get block length of a2dp sbc config.
get allocation method of a2dp sbc config.
Advance Audio Distribution Profile - SBC Codec header.
